rationale: Educ. Code §88.111 governs state acquisition and administration of pine forest land sold for unpaid taxes. It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 88.111. FOREST LAND ACQUIRED BY STATE UNDER TAX SALE.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and this forest land tax-sale provision.
